name: "📊 Share your before/after score"
about: "Got a score improvement? Share it here — helps others know what to expect."
title: "Score: [BEFORE]/100 → [AFTER]/100 — [your field, e.g. Software Engineer]"
labels: ["community", "show-and-tell"]
---

## Your before score

```
Overall: /100
```

Paste the full output of `/resume score` on your original resume if you have it.

## Issues the skill caught

What did it flag? (passive voice, verb repetition, vague filler, missing metrics, wrong headings, format issues)

## Your after score

```
Overall: /100
```

## What changed

What was the biggest improvement? What surprised you?

## Your field

What role/industry? (Helps others in the same field know what to expect.)

---

> **Note:** No personal info needed — just the score and what changed.
